title: Account login failure
description: User cannot log into the account even with the correct credentials.

title: Email notification not sending
description: System fails to send confirmation emails after registration.

title: Broken image links
description: Product images are not displaying on the homepage.

title: Checkout page crash
description: Website crashes when customers try to complete checkout.

title: Password reset issue
description: Password reset link is not working properly.

title: Search function slow
description: Search results take too long to appear.

title: Mobile layout problem
description: Buttons overlap on smaller mobile screens.

title: Payment confirmation delay
description: Customers receive payment confirmation very late.

title: Profile picture upload error
description: Users cannot upload a profile picture successfully.

title: Language switch bug
description: Website language does not change after selecting another language.
